rules.description: Migrate monitoring workloads using Azure Monitor SCOM Managed Instance to supported alternatives based on environment type.
rules.fix: Migrate monitoring workloads using Azure Monitor SCOM Managed Instance to supported alternatives based on environment type.

ARM_Fix.details: Remove the Azure Monitor SCOM Managed Instance monitoring configuration associated with this SQL Managed Instance. For on-premises or hybrid environments, reconfigure monitoring using System Center Operations Manager (self-hosted). For cloud-native environments, replace with Azure Monitor and Log Analytics Workspace integration on the SQL Managed Instance.

TF_Fix.details: Remove the Azure Monitor SCOM Managed Instance monitoring configuration associated with this SQL Managed Instance. For on-premises or hybrid environments, reconfigure monitoring using System Center Operations Manager (self-hosted). For cloud-native environments, configure Azure Monitor and Log Analytics Workspace integration by adding the appropriate diagnostic settings resources in Terraform.
